---
title: "PUM-seq"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---


# Overview

* [Project overview](overview.html)
* [Pipeline](pipeline.html)

# Quality Control -- site calling

**rRNA**

* [Sites filtered by depth & ratio](qc_rRNA.html)
* [Sites filtered by chisq fdr & ratio diff](qc_rRNA_chisq.html)
* [Quality control for all cell lines](qc_rRNA_chisq_allcellline.html)
* [Quality control for all cell lines -- problematic replicates dropped, by Jaccard index](qc_rRNA_chisq_probrep_dropped.html)
* [Quality control for all cell lines, compare Pearson R with BACS](qc_rRNA_replicate_vs_BACS.html)
* [Quality control for all cell lines, compare Pearson R with BACS, problematic replicates dropped, by Pearson R with BACS](qc_rRNA_chisq_r03_dropped.html)


**mRNA**

* [Sites filtered by chisq fdr & ratio diff, determining the fdr & ratio diff cutoffs](qc_mRNA_chisq.html)
* [Joint pooling vs union-of-per-cell-line site calling, 3 cell lines for testing](qc_joint_union.html)
* [QC — Joint cross-cell-line mRNA pU sites (51 cell lines)](qc_joint_all51_mRNA.html)
* [QC — Union cross-cell-line mRNA pU sites (51 cell lines)](qc_union_all51_mRNA.html)
* [QC — Discovery/replication validation of joint-pooled pU site calling](qc_mRNA_discovery_replication.html)
* [Site calling: 5-fold reproducibility filtering of joint-pooled pU site calling](mRNA_5fold_union_site_calling.html)

# QTL mapping

[Treated - input, floor0, quantile normalization, linear regression](qtl_mapping_summary_floor0_quantile.html)
[Binomial GLM model](qtl_mapping_binomial_model.html)
